Simple Process
How It Works
1
Submit Order
Fill out the order form with your design details, sizes, and garment choice. Upload your art or describe what you need.
2
We Confirm
We text you back within a few hours to confirm details, finalize pricing, and collect your 50% deposit to start production.
3
Pick Up or Ship
Your order is ready in 5–7 business days. Local pickup in Ogden or we ship nationwide. Balance due on pickup/delivery.

Got Questions?
FAQ
How long does it take? ▼
Most orders are ready in 5–7 business days. Rush orders may be available — text us at (801) 410-0490 to ask. Team orders of 50+ pieces may take longer.
What file format do you need for my design? ▼
PNG with a transparent background is preferred. We also accept JPG, PDF, AI, EPS, and SVG. Minimum 300 DPI for best print quality. File cleanup is available for $5–$10 if needed.
Do you have order minimums? ▼
No minimums on DTF T-shirts or gang sheet transfers — order 1 or 100. Team and bulk orders start at 12 pieces to qualify for bulk pricing.
Do you ship? ▼
Yes! We ship nationwide. Local pickup is also available in Ogden, Utah. Shipping cost depends on order size and will be included in your final quote.
Can I supply my own blanks? ▼
Absolutely. Bring your own garments and we'll print on them — just subtract the blank cost from the quoted price. Text us first to confirm compatibility.
How does payment work? ▼
We collect a 50% deposit to start production. The remaining balance is due at pickup or before we ship. We accept Venmo, CashApp, and Zelle — all fee-free for you.
